title: Manta droid subfighter
content:
{{Top|leg|canon=Manta droid submarine}} {{AquaticVehicle |image=[[File:MantaDroidSubfightet1-NEGTD.png]] |name=Manta droid subfighter |designer= |manufacturer=[[Haor Chall Engineering/Legends|Haor Chall Engineering]]{{DB|droid|mantasubfighter|manta droid subfighter}} |line= |model=Manta droid subfighter |type=Speeder''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]'' |cost=22,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] |modifier= |sysmods= |length=5 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |speed=160 [[Kilometer per hour/Legends|km/h]] |engine= |depth= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=*[[Laser cannon/Legends|Laser cannons]] (2) *[[Energy torpedo/Legends|Energy torpedo]] launchers (2) **12 torpedos |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew=Integrated [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Droid brain/Legends|brain]] |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |availability=Military |role=Underwater assault |firstuse= |retired= |affiliation=*[[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] *[[Quarren Isolation League/Legends|Quarren Isolation League]] *[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] *[[Great Houses/Legends|Great Houses of Serenno]][[Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets 4|''Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets'' 4]] }} {{Quote|These droids swim and fight like a school of reaver garhai. Let's see the Maramere sea pirates laugh at me now!|[[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]]|''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''}} The '''manta droid subfighter''' was an aquatic [[Droid/Legends|droid]] fighter craft used by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] and later the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. ==Characteristics== {{Quote|Our pursuer has opened fire''"
"''I am aware of that, computer. What armament do we have?''"
"''Two front-firing laser cannons and a front-firing enery torpedo launcher. Two torpedoes. Larger capacity removed to accommodate sentient pilots such as yourself.|An [[Otoh Dooku]]-modified manta subfighter's computer and [[Jahan Cross]]|}} [[File:MantaDroidSubfightet2-NEGTD.png|thumb|left|180px|A manta droid subfighter.]] After military defeats on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], [[Maramere]], and other [[Water/Legends|water]]-covered [[Planet/Legends|planets]], the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] began investing in the research and development of submersible fighter-craft. The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] legislation that prohibited the Trade Federation from developing military droid hardware was only a temporary setback for the project because Trade Federation officials just moved the prototypes away from Republic investigators and bribed or disposed of anyone who discovered their work in progress. The devout [[Xi Charrian/Legends|Xi Charrian]] engineers developed the subfighter while residing on remote private estates, isolated from the rest of their [[Haor Chall Engineering/Legends|Haor Chall Engineering]] religious order, some time prior to the Naboo debacle. As a result of their isolation, their design talents were affected and the end product did suffer a number of design limitations. Nonetheless, the resulting manta droid subfighters were still impressive fighting machines when released in large shoals. The sleek torpedo-like droid body was capped in front of a large wedge-shaped diving plane. The forward edge of the plane had an electromotive field, that when merged with repulsorlift-driven supercavitation vectrals incorporated into the subfighter's design, resulted in a very fast and surprisingly maneuverable underwater vessel. The twin barrels recessed in the plane sport [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] or torpedo launchers, and a few models even featured articulated barrel assemblies that allow both types of weapons on the same fighter. ==History== {{Quote|''Hmm''. Haor Chall manta droid subfighters. Salvage from the Trade Federation after the Clone Wars?''"
"''Borgin's ships. He had them modified for sentient pilots.|Jahan Cross and [[Candra Kitai]]|}} [[File:Manta_droid_subfighter.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Manta [[Droid/Legends|droid]] subfighters during the [[Battle of Mon Calamari (Clone Wars)/Legends|Battle of Mon Calamari]].]] The [[Xi Charrian/Legends|Xi Charrians]] were unable to perfectly reproduce the requested variable geometry feature found in their [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture'' droid starfighter]] designs on the manta droid subfighters. The actuation servomotors required to change the fighter's shape in deep ocean pressures proved too difficult to engineer. As a compensation for this failure to the Trade Federation, the Xi Charrians provided more aquatic craft. This included a [[Separatist Sub-Carrier|larger carrier craft]] and hydrodynamic adapter kits for [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droid]]-operated [[MVR-3 speeder bike|MVR-3 speeders]]. Although having existed for some time, they had their most public combat debut at the [[Battle of Mon Calamari (Clone Wars)/Legends|Battle of Mon Calamari]], the [[Quarren Isolation League/Legends|Quarren Isolation League]] deployed these subfighters against the [[Mon Calamari Knights/Legends|Mon Calamari Knights]] and [[Clone SCUBA trooper/Legends|clone SCUBA troopers]]. Despite the perfectionist [[Xi Char/Legends|Xi Char]] considering the manta droid a failure, the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] and [[Quarren Isolation League/Legends|Quarren Isolation League]] were quite satisfied with it. Following the Clone Wars, a number of surviving manta droids remained on Mon Calamari, and formed their own community. Over time, they created a loose alliance with the [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]], hunting ocean predators in exchange for modifications, repairs and equipment. Approximately three years prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Rodas Borgin]] had a number of manta droid subfighters modified to accommodate sentient pilots. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Cine-Manga|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Cine-Manga]] *{{CW|5}} {{1st}} *[[Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets 4|''Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets'' 4]] ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of manta droid subfighters}} *''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars: Planetary Forces]]'' *{{InsiderCite|81|Star Wars Q&A|Ask the Master}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]'' *{{DB|droid|mantasubfighter|manta droid subfighter}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Manta-Unterseedroidenjäger#legends |es=Subcaza droide Manta |nl=Manta Droid Subfighter |pl=Podwodny śmigacz manta }} [[Category:Droid models of the Confederacy of Independent Systems]] [[Category:Droid vehicle models]] [[Category:Haor Chall Engineering products]] [[Category:Submersible droid models]] [[Category:Vehicle classes of the Confederacy of Independent Systems]]
